Reverts if token is not supported or contract is paused. Updates totalDeposits and emits DepositProcessed event.","params":{"amount":"Amount of tokens or ETH to deposit.","token":"Token address (address(0) for ETH).","user":"Address of the user depositing funds."}},"handleWithdrawal(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"Only callable by WalletRouter when not paused. Reverts if token is not supported, contract is paused, or insufficient balance. Updates totalDeposits and emits WithdrawalProcessed event.","params":{"amount":"Amount of tokens or ETH to withdraw.","recipient":"Address to receive the withdrawn funds.","token":"Token address (address(0) for ETH)."}},"initialize(address,address,address)":{"details":"Reverts if any address is zero or if WalletRouter is not a contract. Initializes UUPS, ReentrancyGuard, and Pausable. Enables ETH support by default. Emits TokenSupportAdded for ETH.","params":{"_roleManager":"Address of the RoleManager contract for access control.","_timelock":"Address of the Timelock contract for delayed operations.","_walletRouter":"Address of the WalletRouter contract for routing deposits and withdrawals."}},"isSupportedToken(address)":{"params":{"token":"Token address to check (address(0) for ETH)."},"returns":{"_0":"True if the token is supported, false otherwise."}},"pause()":{"details":"Only callable by VAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Triggers PausableUpgradeable\u2019s _pause function."},"paused()":{"details":"Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise."},"proposeRecoverFunds(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"Only callable by VAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Reverts if recipient is zero. Reverts if recipient is zero or amount is zero. Calls Timelock to propose the action.","params":{"amount":"Amount of tokens or ETH to sweep.","to":"Address to receive the swept funds.","token":"Token address to sweep (address(0) for ETH)."}},"proxiableUUID()":{"details":"Implementation of the ERC1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier."},"recoverFunds(address,address,uint256,bytes32)":{"details":"Only callable by VAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Reverts if timelock execution fails or insufficient tracked deposits. Emits TokenSupportRemoved event.","params":{"token":"Token address to remove (address(0) for ETH)."}},"setWalletRouter(address,bytes32)":{"details":"Only callable by VAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Reverts if timelock execution fails. Updates walletRouter and emits WalletRouterSet event.","params":{"_walletRouter":"New WalletRouter address.","actionId":"Unique identifier of the proposed action."}},"sweepDust(address,address,uint256,bytes32)":{"details":"Only callable by VAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Triggers PausableUpgradeable\u2019s _unpause function."},"upgradeTo(address)":{"custom:oz-upgrades-unsafe-allow-reachable":"delegatecall","details":"Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. withdrawals."}},"notice":"Manages deposits, withdrawals, and token support for ETH and ERC20 tokens with upgradeability, access control, and timelock ntracts-upgradeable/contracts/security/PausableUpgradeable.sol":{"keccak256":"0x40c636b4572ff5f1dc50cf22097e93c0723ee14eff87e99ac2b02636eeca1250","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://9c7d1f5e15633ab912b74c2f57e24559e66b03232300d4b27ff0f25bc452ecad","dweb:/ipfs/QmYTJkc1cntYkKQ1Tu11nBcJLakiy93Tjytc4XHELo4GmR"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/security/ReentrancyGuardUpgradeable.sol":{"keccak256":"0xb82ef33f43b6b96109687d91b39c94573fdccaaa423fe28e8ba0977b31c023e0","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://ec9c629f63e66379f9c868a74f971064701cc6e30583872aa653f8b932518025","dweb:/ipfs/QmY4MnZF2VMFwJkAwpdQwxEWA3KcGbNBKEmAVYePMVQWUR"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/token/ERC20/IERC20Upgradeable.sol":{"keccak256":"0x0e1f0f5f62f67a881cd1a9597acbc0a5e4071f3c2c10449a183b922ae7272e3f","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://c25f742ff154998d19a669e2508c3597b363e123ce9144cd0fcf6521229f401f","dweb:/ipfs/QmQXRuFzStEWqeEPbhQU6cAg9PaSowxJVo4PDKyRod7dco"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/token/ERC20/extensions/IERC20PermitUpgradeable.sol":{"keccak256":"0xd60f939a3ca0199014d079b4dd66aa757954334947d81eb5c1d35d7a83061ab3","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://ce6e5ae4633559c2aad156be884a96f7a9beb8dd31b1b630a6de55972e3af622","dweb:/ipfs/QmQasz4sQoexkrvB7wCQAY6NbMoCtPS7AqomymRoJGYz85"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/token/ERC20/utils/SafeERC20Upgradeable.sol":{"keccak256":"0x23b997be73d3dd46885262704f0f8cfc7273fdadfe303d37969a9561373972b5","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://d03ebe5406134f0c4a017dee625ff615031194493bd1e88504e5c8fae55bc166","dweb:/ipfs/QmUZV5bMbgk2PAkV3coouSeSainHN2jhqaQDJaA7hQRyu2"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/utils/AddressUpgradeable.sol":{"keccak256":"0x9c80f545915582e63fe206c6ce27cbe85a86fc10b9cd2a0e8c9488fb7c2ee422","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://310136ad60820af4177a11a61d77a3686faf5fca4942b600e08fc940db38396b","dweb:/ipfs/QmbCzMNSTL7Zi7M4UCSqBrkHtp4jjxUnGbkneCZKdR1qeq"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/utils/ContextUpgradeable.sol":{"keccak256":"0x963ea7f0b48b032eef72fe3a7582edf78408d6f834115b9feadd673a4d5bd149","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://d6520943ea55fdf5f0bafb39ed909f64de17051bc954ff3e88c9e5621412c79c","dweb:/ipfs/QmWZ4rAKTQbNG2HxGs46AcTXShsVytKeLs7CUCdCSv5N7a"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/utils/StorageSlotUpgradeable.sol":{"keccak256":"0x07ac95acad040f1fb1f6120dd0aa5f702db69446e95f82613721879d30de0908","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://a9df9de7b5da1d1bd3d4b6c073d0174bc4211db60e794a321c8cb5d4eae34685","dweb:/ipfs/QmWe49zj65jayrCe9jZpoWhYUZ1RiwSxyU2s7SBZnMztVy"]}},"version":1}

addSupportedToken(address).details: Only callable by VAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Reverts if token is already supported or if a non-ETH token is not a contract. Emits TokenSupportAdded event.

params.token: Token address to add (address(0) for ETH).

constructor.details: Prevents the implementation contract from being initialized directly, ensuring safety for UUPS proxy upgrades.

handleDeposit(address,address,uint256).details: Only callable by WalletRouter when not paused. Reverts if token is not supported or contract is paused. Updates totalDeposits and emits DepositProcessed event.

params.amount: Amount of tokens or ETH to deposit.
params.user: Address of the user depositing funds.

handleWithdrawal(address,address,uint256.details: Only callable by WalletRouter when not paused. Reverts if token is not supported, contract is paused, or insufficient balance. Updates totalDeposits and emits WithdrawalProcessed event.

params.amount: Amount of tokens or ETH to withdraw.
params.recipient: Address to receive the withdrawn funds.

initialize(address,address,address).details: Reverts if any address is zero or if WalletRouter is not a contract. Initializes UUPS, ReentrancyGuard, and Pausable. Enables ETH support by default. Emits TokenSupportAdded for ETH.

params._roleManager: Address of the RoleManager contract for access control.
params._timelock: Address of the Timelock contract for delayed operations.
params._walletRouter: Address of the WalletRouter contract for routing deposits and withdrawals.

params.token: Token address to check (address(0) for ETH).

returns._0: True if the token is supported, false otherwise.

pause().details: Only callable by VAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Triggers PausableUpgradeable’s _pause function.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

proposeRecoverFunds(address,address,uint.details: Only callable by VAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Reverts if recipient is zero. Calls Timelock to propose the action.

params.amount: Amount of tokens or ETH to recover.
params.recipient: Address to receive the recovered funds.
params.token: Token address to recover (address(0) for ETH).

proposeSetWalletRouter(address).details: Only callable by VAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Reverts if address is zero. Calls Timelock to propose the action.

proposeSweepDust(address,address,uint256.details: Only callable by VAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Reverts if recipient is zero or amount is zero. Calls Timelock to propose the action.

params.amount: Amount of tokens or ETH to sweep.
params.to: Address to receive the swept funds.
params.token: Token address to sweep (address(0) for ETH).

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

recoverFunds(address,address,uint256,byt.details: Only callable by VAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Reverts if timelock execution fails or insufficient tracked deposits. Updates totalDeposits and emits FundsRecovered event.

params.actionId: Unique identifier of the proposed action.
params.amount: Amount of tokens or ETH to recover.
params.recipient: Address to receive the recovered funds.
params.token: Token address to recover (address(0) for ETH).

removeSupportedToken(address).details: Only callable by VAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Reverts if token is not supported, or if token/ETH has remaining deposits or balance. Emits TokenSupportRemoved event.

params.token: Token address to remove (address(0) for ETH).

setWalletRouter(address,bytes32).details: Only callable by VAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Reverts if timelock execution fails. Updates walletRouter and emits WalletRouterSet event.

params.actionId: Unique identifier of the proposed action.

sweepDust(address,address,uint256,bytes3.details: Only callable by VAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Reverts if amount is zero, token is supported, timelock execution fails, or insufficient untracked balance. Emits DustSwept event.

params.actionId: Unique identifier of the proposed action.
params.amount: Amount of tokens or ETH to sweep.
params.to: Recipient address to receive the swept funds.
params.token: Token address to sweep (address(0) for ETH).

unpause().details: Only callable by VAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Triggers PausableUpgradeable’s _unpause function.

upgradeTo(address).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

RECOVER_FUNDS().notice: Constant for the RECOVER_FUNDS action identifier used in timelock proposals.

SET_WALLETROUTER().notice: Constant for the SET_WALLETROUTER action identifier used in timelock proposals.

SWEEP_DUST().notice: Constant for the SWEEP_DUST action identifier used in timelock proposals.

addSupportedToken(address).notice: Adds a token to the supported tokens list.

constructor.notice: Constructor to disable initialization of the implementation contract.

handleDeposit(address,address,uint256).notice: Records a deposit of a supported token or ETH for a user.

handleWithdrawal(address,address,uint256.notice: Processes a withdrawal of a supported token or ETH to a recipient.

initialize(address,address,address).notice: Initializes the Vault with RoleManager, WalletRouter, and Timelock addresses.

isSupportedToken(address).notice: Checks if a token is supported by the Vault.

pause().notice: Pauses deposits and withdrawals in the Vault.

proposeRecoverFunds(address,address,uint.notice: Proposes recovering funds from the Vault via the Timelock.

proposeSetWalletRouter(address).notice: Proposes setting a new WalletRouter address via the Timelock.

proposeSweepDust(address,address,uint256.notice: Proposes sweeping untracked (dust) tokens or ETH via the Timelock.

recoverFunds(address,address,uint256,byt.notice: Executes recovering funds from the Vault after timelock validation.

removeSupportedToken(address).notice: Removes a token from the supported tokens list.

roleManager().notice: Address of the RoleManager contract for access control.

setWalletRouter(address,bytes32).notice: Executes setting a new WalletRouter address after timelock validation.

supportedTokens(address).notice: Mapping of token addresses to their support status (address(0) for ETH).

sweepDust(address,address,uint256,bytes3.notice: Executes sweeping of untracked (dust) tokens or ETH after timelock validation.

timelock().notice: Address of the Timelock contract for delayed execution of sensitive operations.

totalDeposits(address).notice: Mapping of token addresses to their total deposited amounts.

unpause().notice: Unpauses deposits and withdrawals in the Vault.

walletRouter().notice: Address of the WalletRouter contract that routes deposits and withdrawals.
